This move cannot be used successfully unless the user's current form, while considering Transform, is Full Belly or Hangry Mode Morpeko.

auroraveil.shortDescJa: Reduces damage five turns, but must be used during hail.
auroraveil.descJa: Places the Aurora Veil effect on the user’s side of the field for the next 5 turns.  If the weather is not Hail, or the weather is disabled by the effects of Cloud Nine or Air Lock, this move will fail.

avalanche.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target damaged the user this turn and was the last to do so, this move has double power.

axekick.descJa: Has a 30% chance to confuse the target. If this attack is not successful, the user loses half of its maximum HP, rounded down, as crash damage. Pokemon with the Magic Guard Ability are unaffected by crash damage.

batonpass.shortDescJa: Allows the trainer to switch out the user and pass effects along to its replacement.
batonpass.descJa: User switches out, and the trainer selects a replacement Pokémon from the party.  Stat changes, confusion, and persistent move effects are passed along to the replacement Pokémon.

Calculated stats are ignored; the base stats for the target and assorted attackers are used instead.  The random factor in the damage formula is not used.  Dark Pokémon still get STAB.

Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.

If the target hasn’t used a move since entering the field, if it tried to use a move this turn and failed,  if its last used move has 0 PP remaining, or if it already has a move disabled, this move will fail.

mysticalfire.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

nastyplot.shortDescJa: Raises the user’s Special Attack by two stages.
nastyplot.descJa: Raises the user’s Special Attack by two stages.

nightdaze.shortDescJa: Has a chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
nightdaze.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.

nightshade.shortDescJa: Inflicts damage equal to the user’s level.
nightshade.descJa: Inflicts damage equal to the user’s level.  Type immunity applies, but other type effects are ignored.

nightslash.shortDescJa: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
nightslash.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.

nobleroar.shortDescJa: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage.
nobleroar.descJa: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage.

nuzzle.shortDescJa: Has a chance to paralyze the target.
nuzzle.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to paralyze the target.

outrage.shortDescJa: Hits every turn for 2-3 turns, then confuses the user.
outrage.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User is forced to attack with this move for 2–3 turns,selected at random.  After the last hit, the user becomes confused.

overheat.shortDescJa: Lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages after inflicting damage.
overheat.descJa: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages.

painsplit.shortDescJa: Sets the user’s and targets’s HP to the average of their current HP.
painsplit.descJa: Changes the user’s and target’s remaining HP to the average of their current remaining HP.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  This effect does not count as inflicting damage for other moves and effects that respond to damage taken.

paraboliccharge.shortDescJa: Heals the user for half the total damage dealt to all targets.
paraboliccharge.descJa: Heals the user for half the total damage dealt to all targets.

partingshot.shortDescJa: Lowers all targets’ Attack and Special Attack by one stage.  Makes the user switch out.
partingshot.descJa: Lowers all targets’ Attack and Special Attack by one stage.  Makes the user switch out.

payback.shortDescJa: Power is doubled if the target has already moved this turn.
payback.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target uses a move or switches out this turn before this move is used, this move has double power.

perishsong.shortDescJa: User and target both faint after three turns.
perishsong.descJa: Every Pokémon is given a counter that starts at 3 and decreases by 1 at the end of every turn, including this one.  When a Pokémon’s counter reaches zero, that Pokémon faints.  A Pokémon that leaves the field will lose its counter; its replacement does not inherit the effect, and other Pokémon’s counters remain.

petaldance.shortDescJa: Hits every turn for 2-3 turns, then confuses the user.
petaldance.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User is forced to attack with this move for 2–3 turns,selected at random.  After the last hit, the user becomes confused.

phantomforce.shortDescJa: User vanishes, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.  Hits through Protect and Detect.
phantomforce.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User vanishes for one turn, becoming immune to attack, and hits on the second turn.

pinmissile.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits 2–5 times in one turn.

playrough.shortDescJa: Has a chance to lower the target’s Attack by one stage.
playrough.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to lower the target’s Attack by one stage.

pluck.shortDescJa: If target has a berry, inflicts double damage and uses the berry.
pluck.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target is holding a berry, this move has double power, and the user takes the berry and uses it immediately.

poisonfang.shortDescJa: Has a chance to badly poison the target.
poisonfang.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to badly poison the target.

poisonjab.shortDescJa: Has a chance to poison the target.
poisonjab.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to poison the target.

pollenpuff.shortDescJa: Damages opponents, but heals allies for 50% of their max HP.
pollenpuff.descJa: If the target is an opponent, inflicts regular damage.  If the target is an ally, heals the target for 50% of its max HP.

poltergeist.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

populationbomb.shortDescJa: Hits 10 times. Each hit can miss.
populationbomb.descJa: Hits ten times. This move checks accuracy for each hit, and the attack ends if the target avoids a hit. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit ten times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move hits four to ten times at random without checking accuracy between hits.

pounce.shortDescJa: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1.
pounce.descJa: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.

pound.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

powergem.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

powershift.shortDescJa: Switches user's Attack and Defense stats.
powershift.descJa: The user swaps its Attack and Defense stats, and stat stage changes remain on their respective stats. This move can be used again to swap the stats back. If the user uses Baton Pass, the replacement will have its Attack and Defense stats swapped if the effect is active. If the user has its stats recalculated by changing forme while its stats are swapped, this effect is ignored but is still active for the purposes of Baton Pass.

powersplit.shortDescJa: Averages Attack and Special Attack with the target.
powersplit.descJa: Averages the user’s unmodified Attack with the target’s unmodified Attack; the value becomes the unmodified Attack for both Pokémon. Unmodified Special Attack is averaged the same way.

powerswap.shortDescJa: User swaps Attack and Special Attack changes with the target.
powerswap.descJa: User swaps its Attack and Special Attack stat modifiers modifiers with the target.

powertrick.descJa: The user’s original Attack and Defense are swapped.

powertrip.shortDescJa: Power is higher the more the user’s stats have been raised, to a maximum of 31×.
powertrip.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Power is increased by 100% its original value for every stage any of the user’s stats have been raised.  Accuracy, evasion, and lowered stats do not affect this move’s power.  For a Pokémon with all five stats modified to +6, this move’s power is 31×.

powerwhip.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

protect.shortDescJa: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.
protect.descJa: No moves will hit the user for the remainder of this turn.  If the user is last to act this turn, this move will fail.

psychup.shortDescJa: Discards the user’s stat changes and copies the target’s.
psychup.descJa: Discards the user’s stat changes and copies the target’s.

psychic.shortDescJa: Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
psychic.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

psychicfangs.descJa: Destroys any Light Screen or Reflect on the target’s side of the field, then inflicts regular damage.

psychicnoise.shortDescJa: For 2 turns, the target is prevented from healing.
psychicnoise.descJa: For 2 turns, the target is prevented from restoring any HP as long as it remains active. During the effect, healing and draining moves are unusable, and Abilities and items that grant healing will not heal the user. If an affected Pokemon uses Baton Pass, the replacement will remain unable to restore its HP. Pain Split and the Regenerator Ability are unaffected.

psychicterrain.shortDescJa: Protects Pokémon on the ground from priority moves and increases the power of their  Psychic moves by 50%.
psychicterrain.descJa: Changes the terrain to Psychic Terrain for 5 turns.  Overrides Electric Terrain, Grassy Terrain, and Misty Terrain.

psychocut.shortDescJa: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
psychocut.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.

psyshieldbash.shortDescJa: 100% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1.
psyshieldbash.descJa: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1 stage.

psyshock.shortDescJa: Inflicts damage based on the target’s Defense, not Special Defense.
psyshock.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Damage calculation always uses the target’s Defense, regardless of this move’s damage class.

quash.shortDescJa: Makes the target act last this turn.
quash.descJa: Forces the target to act last this turn, regardless of Speed or move priority.  If the target has already acted this turn, this move will fail.

quickattack.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

quickguard.shortDescJa: Prevents any priority moves from hitting friendly Pokémon this turn.
quickguard.descJa: Moves with priority greater than 0 will not hit friendly Pokémon for the remainder of this turn.  If the user is last to act this turn, this move will fail.

quiverdance.shortDescJa: Raises the user’s Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by one stage each.
quiverdance.descJa: Raises the user’s Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by one stage each.

ragepowder.shortDescJa: Redirects the target’s single-target effects to the user for this turn.
ragepowder.descJa: Until the end of this turn, any moves that opposing Pokémon target solely at the user’s ally will instead target the user.  If both Pokémon on the same side of the field use this move on the same turn, the Pokémon that uses it last will become the target.

ragingbull.shortDescJa: Destroys screens. Type depends on user's form.
ragingbull.descJa: If this attack does not miss, the effects of Reflect, Light Screen, and Aurora Veil end for the target's side of the field before damage is calculated. If the user's current form is a Paldean Tauros, this move's type changes to match. Fighting type for Combat Breed, Fire type for Blaze Breed, and Water type for Aqua Breed.

ragingfury.shortDescJa: Lasts 2-3 turns. Confuses the user afterwards.
ragingfury.descJa: The user spends two or three turns locked into this move and becomes confused immediately after its move on the last turn of the effect if it is not already. This move targets an opposing Pokemon at random on each turn. If the user is prevented from moving, is asleep at the beginning of a turn, or the attack is not successful against the target on the first turn of the effect or the second turn of a three-turn effect, the effect ends without causing confusion. If this move is called by Sleep Talk and the user is asleep, the move is used for one turn and does not confuse the user.

raindance.shortDescJa: Changes the weather to rain for five turns.
raindance.descJa: Changes the weather to rain for five turns, during which Water moves inflict 50% extra damage, and Fire moves inflict half damage.

rapidspin.shortDescJa: Frees the user from binding moves, removes Leech Seed, and blows away Spikes.
rapidspin.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Removes Leech Seed from the user, frees the user from Bind, Clamp, Fire Spin, Magma Storm, Sand Tomb, Whirlpool, and Wrap, and clears Spikes, Stealth Rock, and Toxic Spikes from the user’s side of the field.  If this move misses or has no effect, its effect doesn’t activate.

razorshell.shortDescJa: Has a chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
razorshell.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.

recover.shortDescJa: Heals the user by half its max HP.
recover.descJa: Heals the user for half its max HP.

recycle.shortDescJa: User recovers the item it last used up.
recycle.descJa: User recovers the last item consumed by the user or a Pokémon in its position on the field.  The item must be used again before it can be recovered by this move again.  If the user is holding an item, this move fails.

reflect.shortDescJa: Reduces damage from physical attacks by half.
reflect.descJa: Erects a barrier around the user’s side of the field that reduces damage from physical attacks by half for five turns.  In double battles, the reduction is 1/3.  Critical hits are not affected by the barrier.

reflecttype.descJa: User’s type changes to match the target’s.

rest.shortDescJa: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.
rest.descJa: User falls to sleep and immediately regains all its HP.  If the user has another major status effect, sleep will replace it.  The user will always wake up after two turns, or one turn with Early Bird.

reversal.shortDescJa: Inflicts more damage when the user has less HP remaining, with a maximum of 200 power.
reversal.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Power varies inversely with the user’s proportional remaining HP.

risingvoltage.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

roar.shortDescJa: Immediately ends wild battles.  Forces trainers to switch Pokémon.
roar.descJa: Switches the target out for another of its trainer’s Pokémon selected at random.  Wild battles end immediately.

rockblast.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits 2–5 times in one turn.

rockpolish.shortDescJa: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.
rockpolish.descJa: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.

rockslide.shortDescJa: Has a chance to make the target flinch.
rockslide.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to make the target flinch.

rocktomb.shortDescJa: Has a chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
rocktomb.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

rockwrecker.shortDescJa: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.
rockwrecker.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.

roleplay.descJa: User’s ability is replaced with the target’s until the user leaves the field.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.

roost.shortDescJa: Heals the user by half its max HP.
roost.descJa: Heals the user for half its max HP.  If the user is Flying, its Flying type is ignored until the end of this turn.

round.shortDescJa: Has double power if it’s used more than once per turn.
round.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  If Round has already been used this turn, this move’s power is doubled.  After this move is used, any other Pokémon using it this turn will immediately do so (in the order they would otherwise act), regardless of Speed or priority.  Pokémon using other moves will then continue to act as usual.

sacredsword.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Damage calculation ignores the target’s stat modifiers, including evasion.

safeguard.shortDescJa: Protects the user’s field from major status ailments and confusion for five turns.
safeguard.descJa: Protects Pokémon on the user’s side of the field from major status effects and confusion for five turns.  Does not cancel existing ailments.  This effect remains even if the user leaves the field.

saltcure.shortDescJa: Deals 1/16 max HP each turn; 1/8 on Steel, Water.
saltcure.descJa: Causes damage to the target equal to 1/16 of its maximum HP (1/8 if the target is Steel or Water type), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. This effect ends when the target is no longer active.

sandtomb.shortDescJa: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.
sandtomb.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn.  The user continues to use other moves during this time.  If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.

sandstorm.shortDescJa: Changes the weather to a sandstorm for five turns.
sandstorm.descJa: Changes the weather to a sandstorm for five turns.  Pokémon that are not Ground, Rock, or Steel take 1/16 their max HP at the end of every turn.  Every Rock Pokémon’s original Special Defense is raised by 50% for the duration of this effect.

scald.shortDescJa: Has a chance to burn the target.
scald.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to burn the target.

scaleshot.shortDescJa: Boosts the user’s Speed and lowers their Defense by one stage after inflicting damage two to five times in a row.
scaleshot.descJa: Inflicts regular damage two to five times in a row, raising the user’s Speed and lowering the user’s Defense by one stage each upon last hit.

scaryface.shortDescJa: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.
scaryface.descJa: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.

scorchingsands.shortDescJa: Has a chance to burn the target.
scorchingsands.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to burn the target.

screech.shortDescJa: Lowers the target’s Defense by two stages.
screech.descJa: Lowers the target’s Defense by two stages.

seedbomb.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

seismictoss.shortDescJa: Inflicts damage equal to the user’s level.
seismictoss.descJa: Inflicts damage equal to the user’s level.  Type immunity applies, but other type effects are ignored.

selfdestruct.descJa: User faints, even if the attack fails or misses.  Inflicts regular damage.

shadowball.shortDescJa: Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
shadowball.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

shadowclaw.shortDescJa: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
shadowclaw.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.

shadowpunch.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.

shadowsneak.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

shedtail.shortDescJa: User takes 1/2 its max HP to pass a substitute.
shedtail.descJa: The user takes 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded up, and creates a substitute that has 1/4 of the user's maximum HP, rounded down. The user is replaced with another Pokemon in its party and the selected Pokemon has the substitute transferred to it. Fails if the user would faint, or if there are no unfainted party members.

sheercold.descJa: Inflicts damage equal to the target’s max HP.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  This move’s accuracy is 30% plus 1% for each level the user is higher than the target.  If the user is a lower level than the target, this move will fail.

shellsidearm.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

shellsmash.shortDescJa: Raises user’s Attack, Special Attack, and Speed by two stages.  Lower user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage.
shellsmash.descJa: Raises the user’s Attack, Special Attack, and Speed by two stages each.  Lowers the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage each.

shelter.descJa: Raises the user's Defense by 2 stages.

simplebeam.shortDescJa: Changes the target’s ability to Simple.
simplebeam.descJa: Changes the target’s ability to Simple.

skillswap.descJa: User and target switch abilities.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.

skittersmack.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

skyattack.shortDescJa: User charges for one turn before attacking.  Has a chance to make the target flinch.
skyattack.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User charges for one turn before attacking.  Critical hit chance is one level higher than normal.  Has a chance to make the target flinch.

slackoff.shortDescJa: Heals the user by half its max HP.
slackoff.descJa: Heals the user for half its max HP.

sleeptalk.shortDescJa: Randomly uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Only works if the user is sleeping.
sleeptalk.descJa: Only usable if the user is sleeping.  Randomly selects and uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Use of the selected move requires and costs 0 PP.

sludgebomb.shortDescJa: Has a chance to poison the target.
sludgebomb.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to poison the target.

sludgewave.shortDescJa: Has a chance to poison the target.
sludgewave.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to poison the target.

smackdown.shortDescJa: Removes any immunity to Ground damage.
smackdown.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Removes the target’s immunity to Ground-type damage.  This effect removes any existing Ground immunity due to Levitate, Magnet Rise, or Telekinesis, and causes the target’s Flying type to be ignored when it takes Ground damage.

smartstrike.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.

snaptrap.shortDescJa: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.
snaptrap.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn.  The user continues to use other moves during this time.  If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.

snarl.shortDescJa: Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
snarl.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

snore.shortDescJa: Has a chance to make the target flinch.  Only works if the user is sleeping.
snore.descJa: Only usable if the user is sleeping.  Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to make the target flinch.

snowscape.shortDescJa: For 5 turns, snow falls. Ice: 1.5x Def.
snowscape.descJa: For 5 turns, the weather becomes Snow. During the effect, the Defense of Ice-type Pokemon is multiplied by 1.5 when taking damage from a physical attack. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Icy Rock. Fails if the current weather is Snow.

soak.shortDescJa: Changes the target’s type to Water.
soak.descJa: Changes the target to pure Water-type until it leaves the field.  If the target has Multitype, this move will fail.

softboiled.shortDescJa: Heals the user by half its max HP.
softboiled.descJa: Heals the user for half its max HP.

solarbeam.shortDescJa: Requires a turn to charge before attacking.
solarbeam.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User charges for one turn before attacking.

solarblade.shortDescJa: Requires a turn to charge before attacking.
solarblade.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User charges for one turn before attacking.

sparklingaria.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target has a burn and takes damage from this move, its burn is healed.

speedswap.shortDescJa: Exchanges the user’s Speed with the target’s.
speedswap.descJa: Exchanges the original Speed stats of the user and target.

spicyextract.shortDescJa: Raises target's Atk by 2 and lowers its Def by 2.
spicyextract.descJa: Raises the target's Attack by 2 stages and lowers its Defense by 2 stages.

spikes.shortDescJa: Scatters Spikes, hurting opposing Pokémon that switch in.
spikes.descJa: Scatters spikes around the opposing field, which damage opposing Pokémon that enter the field for 1/8 of their max HP.  Pokémon immune to Ground moves are immune to this damage, except during Gravity.  Up to three layers of spikes may be laid down, adding 1/16 to the damage done: two layers of spikes damage for 3/16 max HP, and three layers damage for 1/4 max HP.

spikyshield.shortDescJa: Blocks damaging attacks and damages attacking Pokémon for 1/8 their max HP.
spikyshield.descJa: Blocks damaging attacks and damages attacking Pokémon for 1/8 their max HP.

spiritshackle.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Traps the target.

spitup.shortDescJa: Power is 100 times the amount of energy Stockpiled.
spitup.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Power is equal to 100 times the amount of energy stored by Stockpile.  Ignores the random factor in the damage formula.  Stored energy is consumed, and the user’s Defense and Special Defense are reset to what they would be if Stockpile had not been used.  If the user has no energy stored, this move will fail.

spite.shortDescJa: Lowers the PP of the target’s last used move by 4.
spite.descJa: Lowers the PP of the target’s last used move by 4.  If the target hasn’t used a move since entering the field, if it tried to use a move this turn and failed, or if its last used move has 0 PP remaining, this move will fail.

stealthrock.shortDescJa: Causes damage when opposing Pokémon switch in.
stealthrock.descJa: Spreads sharp rocks around the opposing field, damaging any Pokémon that enters the field for 1/8 its max HP.  This damage is affected by the entering Pokémon’s susceptibility to Rock moves.

steelbeam.shortDescJa: Inflicts damage, and the user takes damage equal to half of its max HP, rounded up.
steelbeam.descJa: Inflicts damage, and the user takes damage equal to half of its max HP, rounded up. The user still takes damage if the move is blocked by Protect or Substitute, misses, or if the target has Flash Fire.

steelroller.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

steelwing.shortDescJa: Has a chance to raise the user’s Defense by one stage.
steelwing.descJa: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to raise the user’s Defense one stage.

stickyweb.shortDescJa: Covers the opposing field, lowering opponents’ Speed by one stage upon switching in.
stickyweb.descJa: Shoots a web over the opponents’ side of the field, which lowers the Speed of any opposing Pokémon that enters the field by one stage.

stockpile.shortDescJa: Stores energy up to three times for use with Spit Up and Swallow.
stockpile.descJa: Raises the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage each.  Stores energy for use with Spit Up and Swallow.  Up to three levels of energy can be stored, and all are lost if the user leaves the field.  Energy is still stored even if the stat boosts cannot be applied.

stompingtantrum.shortDescJa: Has double power if the user’s last move failed.
stompingtantrum.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Power is doubled if the user’s last move failed for any reason (i.e., produced the message "But it failed!") or was ineffective due to types.

stoneaxe.shortDescJa: Sets Stealth Rock on the target's side.
stoneaxe.descJa: If this move is successful, it sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, damaging each opposing Pokemon that switches in. Foes lose 1/32, 1/16, 1/8, 1/4, or 1/2 of their maximum HP, rounded down, based on their weakness to the Rock type; 0.25x, 0.5x, neutral, 2x, or 4x, respectively. Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.

stoneedge.shortDescJa: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
stoneedge.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.

storedpower.shortDescJa: Power is higher the more the user’s stats have been raised, to a maximum of 31×.
storedpower.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Power is increased by 100% its original value for every stage any of the user’s stats have been raised.  Accuracy, evasion, and lowered stats do not affect this move’s power.  For a Pokémon with all five stats modified to +6, this move’s power is 31×.

stormthrow.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Always scores a critical hit.

strengthsap.shortDescJa: Heals the user by the target’s current Attack stat and lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.
strengthsap.descJa: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.  Heals the user by the target’s current Attack, including modifiers, but not including this move’s Attack-lowering effect.

stringshot.shortDescJa: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.
stringshot.descJa: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.

struggle.shortDescJa: User takes 1/4 its max HP in recoil.
struggle.descJa: Inflicts typeless regular damage.  User takes 1/4 its max HP in recoil.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.

strugglebug.shortDescJa: Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
strugglebug.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

stuffcheeks.shortDescJa: Cures the entire party of major status effects after inflicting damage.
stuffcheeks.descJa: Inflicts regular damage, then (if successful) removes major status effects from every Pokémon in the user’s party.

substitute.shortDescJa: Transfers 1/4 of the user’s max HP into a doll, protecting the user from further damage or status changes until it breaks.
substitute.descJa: Transfers 1/4 the user’s max HP into a doll that absorbs damage and causes most negative move effects to fail.  If the user leaves the field, the doll will vanish.  If the user cannot pay the HP cost, this move will fail.

suckerpunch.shortDescJa: Only works if the target is about to use a damaging move.
suckerpunch.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target has not selected a damaging move this turn, or if the target has already acted this turn, this move will fail.

sunnyday.shortDescJa: Changes the weather to sunny for five turns.
sunnyday.descJa: Changes the weather to sunshine for five turns, during which Fire moves inflict 50% extra damage, and Water moves inflict half damage.

superfang.shortDescJa: Inflicts damage equal to half the target’s HP.
superfang.descJa: Inflicts typeless damage equal to half the target’s remaining HP.

supercellslam.shortDescJa: User is hurt by 50% of its max HP if it misses.
supercellslam.descJa: If this attack is not successful, the user loses half of its maximum HP, rounded down, as crash damage. Pokemon with the Magic Guard Ability are unaffected by crash damage. Damage doubles and no accuracy check is done if the target has used Minimize while active.

superpower.shortDescJa: Lowers the user’s Attack and Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.
superpower.descJa: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Attack and Defense by one stage each.

surf.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage and can hit Dive users.

swagger.shortDescJa: Raises the target’s Attack by two stages and confuses the target.
swagger.descJa: Raises the target’s Attack by two stages, then confuses it.  If the target’s Attack cannot be raised by two stages, the confusion is not applied.

swallow.shortDescJa: Recovers 1/4 HP after one Stockpile, 1/2 HP after two Stockpiles, or full HP after three Stockpiles.
swallow.descJa: Heals the user depending on the amount of energy stored by Stockpile: 1/4 its max HP after one use, 1/2 its max HP after two uses, or fully after three uses.  Stored energy is consumed, and the user’s Defense and Special Defense are reset to what they would be if Stockpile had not been used.  If the user has no energy stored, this move will fail.

sweetscent.shortDescJa: Lowers the target’s evasion by one stage.
sweetscent.descJa: Lowers the target’s evasion by one stage.

switcheroo.descJa: User and target permanently swap held items.  Works even if one of the Pokémon isn’t holding anything.  If either Pokémon is holding mail, this move will fail.

swordsdance.shortDescJa: Raises the user’s Attack by two stages.
swordsdance.descJa: Raises the user’s Attack by two stages.

synthesis.shortDescJa: Heals the user by half its max HP.  Affected by weather.
synthesis.descJa: Heals the user for half its max HP.

syrupbomb.shortDescJa: Target's Speed is lowered by 1 stage for 3 turns.
syrupbomb.descJa: If this move is successful, it causes the target's Speed to be lowered by 1 stage at the end of each turn for 3 turns.

tailslap.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits 2–5 times in one turn.

tailwind.shortDescJa: For three turns, friendly Pokémon have doubled Speed.
tailwind.descJa: For the next three turns, all Pokémon on the user’s side of the field have their original Speed doubled.  This effect remains if the user leaves the field.

taunt.shortDescJa: For the next few turns, the target can only use damaging moves.
taunt.descJa: Target is forced to only use damaging moves for the next 3–5 turns, selected at random.  Moves that select other moves not known in advance do not count as damaging.

tearfullook.shortDescJa: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage.
tearfullook.descJa: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage each.

teatime.shortDescJa: All active Pokemon consume held Berries.
teatime.descJa: All active Pokemon consume their held Berries. This effect is not prevented by substitutes, the Klutz or Unnerve Abilities, or the effects of Embargo or Magic Room. Fails if no active Pokemon is holding a Berry.

temperflare.shortDescJa: Power doubles if the user's last move failed.
temperflare.descJa: Power doubles if the user's last move on the previous turn, including moves called by other moves or those used through Instruct, Magic Coat, Snatch, or the Dancer or Magic Bounce Abilities, failed to do any of its normal effects, not including damage from an unsuccessful High Jump Kick, Jump Kick, or Mind Blown, or if the user was prevented from moving by any effect other than recharging or Sky Drop. A move that was blocked by Baneful Bunker, Detect, King's Shield, Protect, Spiky Shield, Crafty Shield, Mat Block, Quick Guard, or Wide Guard will not double this move's power, nor will Bounce or Fly ending early due to the effect of Gravity, Smack Down, or Thousand Arrows.

terrainpulse.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

thief.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target is holding an item and the user is not, the user will permanently take the item.  Damage is still inflicted if an item cannot be taken.

thrash.shortDescJa: Hits every turn for 2-3 turns, then confuses the user.
thrash.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User is forced to attack with this move for 2–3 turns,selected at random.  After the last hit, the user becomes confused.

throatchop.shortDescJa: Prevents the target from using sound-based moves for two turns.
throatchop.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Silences the target for two turns, preventing it from using any sound-based moves.

thunder.shortDescJa: Has a chance to paralyze the target.
thunder.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to paralyze the target.

thunderfang.shortDescJa: Has a chance to paralyze the target and a chance to make the target flinch.
thunderfang.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to paralyze the target and a separate chance to make the target flinch.

thunderpunch.shortDescJa: Has a chance to paralyze the target.
thunderpunch.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to paralyze the target.

thunderbolt.shortDescJa: Has a chance to paralyze the target.
thunderbolt.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to paralyze the target.

tickle.shortDescJa: Lowers the target’s Attack and Defense by one stage.
tickle.descJa: Lowers the target’s Attack and Defense by one stage.

tidyup.shortDescJa: User +1 Atk, Spe. Clears all substitutes/hazards.
tidyup.descJa: Raises the user's Attack and Speed by 1 stage. Removes substitutes from all active Pokemon and ends the effects of Spikes, Stealth Rock, Sticky Web, and Toxic Spikes for both sides.

torchsong.shortDescJa: 100% chance to raise the user's Sp. Atk by 1.
torchsong.descJa: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Special Attack by 1 stage.

torment.shortDescJa: Prevents the target from using the same move twice in a row.
torment.descJa: Prevents the target from attempting to use the same move twice in a row.  When the target leaves the field, this effect ends.

toxic.shortDescJa: Badly poisons the target, inflicting more damage every turn.
toxic.descJa: Badly poisons the target.  Never misses when used by a Poison-type Pokémon.

toxicspikes.shortDescJa: Scatters poisoned spikes, poisoning opposing Pokémon that switch in.
toxicspikes.descJa: Scatters poisoned spikes around the opposing field, which poison opposing Pokémon that enter the field.  A second layer of these spikes may be laid down, in which case Pokémon will be badly poisoned instead.  Pokémon immune to either Ground moves or being poisoned are immune to this effect.  Pokémon otherwise immune to Ground moves are affected during Gravity.

toxicthread.shortDescJa: Poisons the target and lowers its Speed by one stage.
toxicthread.descJa: Poisons the target and lowers its Speed by one stage.

trailblaze.shortDescJa: 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1.
trailblaze.descJa: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1 stage.

transform.shortDescJa: User becomes a copy of the target until it leaves battle.
transform.descJa: User copies the target’s species, weight, type, ability, calculated stats (except HP), and moves.  Copied moves will all have 5 PP remaining.  IVs are copied for the purposes of Hidden Power, but stats are not recalculated.

triattack.shortDescJa: Has a chance to burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.
triattack.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.  One of these effects is selected at random; they do not each have independent chances to occur.

trick.descJa: User and target permanently swap held items.  Works even if one of the Pokémon isn’t holding anything.  If either Pokémon is holding mail, this move will fail.

trickroom.shortDescJa: For five turns, slower Pokémon will act before faster Pokémon.
trickroom.descJa: For five turns (including this one), slower Pokémon will act before faster Pokémon.  Move priority is not affected.  Using this move when its effect is already active will end the effect.

trickortreat.shortDescJa: Adds Ghost to the target’s types.
trickortreat.descJa: Adds Ghost to the target’s types.

triplearrows.descJa: Has a 50% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage, a 30% chance to make it flinch, and a higher chance for a critical hit.

tripleaxel.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

tropkick.shortDescJa: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage after inflicting damage.
tropkick.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.

twinbeam.descJa: Hits twice. If the first hit breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the second hit.

uturn.shortDescJa: User must switch out after attacking.
uturn.descJa: Inflicts regular damage, then the user immediately switches out, and the trainer selects a replacement Pokémon from the party.  If the target faints from this attack, the user’s trainer selects the new Pokémon to send out first.  If the user is the last Pokémon in its party that can battle, it will not switch out.

upperhand.shortDescJa: 100% flinch. Fails unless target using priority.
upperhand.descJa: Has a 100% chance to make the target flinch. Fails if the target did not select a priority move for use this turn, or if the target moves before the user.

uproar.shortDescJa: Forced to use this move for several turns.  Pokémon cannot fall asleep in that time.
uproar.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User is forced to use this move for 2–5 turns, selected at random.  All Pokémon on the field wake up, and none can fall to sleep until the lock-in ends.

vacuumwave.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

venoshock.shortDescJa: Inflicts double damage if the target is Poisoned.
venoshock.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target is poisoned, this move has double power.

voltswitch.shortDescJa: User must switch out after attacking.
voltswitch.descJa: Inflicts regular damage, then the user immediately switches out, and the trainer selects a replacement Pokémon from the party.  If the target faints from this attack, the user’s trainer selects the new Pokémon to send out first.  If the user is the last Pokémon in its party that can battle, it will not switch out.

volttackle.shortDescJa: User takes 1/3 the damage inflicted in recoil.  Has a chance to paralyze the target.
volttackle.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User takes 1/3 the damage it inflicts in recoil.  Has a chance to paralyze the target.

waterpulse.shortDescJa: Has a chance to confuse the target.
waterpulse.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to confuse the target.

waterspout.shortDescJa: Inflicts more damage when the user has more HP remaining, with a maximum of 150 power.
waterspout.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Power increases with the user’s remaining HP and is given by `150 * HP / max HP`, to a maximum of 150 when the user has full HP.

waterfall.shortDescJa: Has a chance to make the target flinch.
waterfall.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to make the target flinch.

wavecrash.descJa: If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 33% the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.

weatherball.shortDescJa: If there be weather, this move has doubled power and the weather’s type.
weatherball.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  If a weather move is active, this move has double power, and its type becomes the type of the weather move.  Shadow Sky is typeless for the purposes of this move.

whirlpool.shortDescJa: Prevents the target from leaving battle and inflicts 1/16 its max HP in damage for 2-5 turns.
whirlpool.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn.  The user continues to use other moves during this time.  If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.

whirlwind.shortDescJa: Immediately ends wild battles.  Forces trainers to switch Pokémon.
whirlwind.descJa: Switches the target out for another of its trainer’s Pokémon selected at random.  Wild battles end immediately.

wideguard.shortDescJa: Prevents any multi-target moves from hitting friendly Pokémon this turn.
wideguard.descJa: Moves with multiple targets will not hit friendly Pokémon for the remainder of this turn.  If the user is last to act this turn, this move will fail.

wildcharge.shortDescJa: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.
wildcharge.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User takes 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

wish.shortDescJa: User will recover half its max HP at the end of the next turn.
wish.descJa: At the end of the next turn, user will be healed for half its max HP.  If the user is switched out, its replacement will be healed instead for half of the user’s max HP.  If the user faints or is forcefully switched by Roar or Whirlwind, this effect will not activate.

wonderroom.shortDescJa: All Pokémon’s Defense and Special Defense are swapped for 5 turns.
wonderroom.descJa: For five turns (including this one), every Pokémon’s Defense and Special Defense are swapped.

woodhammer.shortDescJa: User receives 1/3 the damage inflicted in recoil.
woodhammer.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User takes 1/3 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

worryseed.shortDescJa: Changes the target’s ability to Insomnia.
worryseed.descJa: Changes the target’s ability to Insomnia.

wrap.shortDescJa: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.
wrap.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn.  The user continues to use other moves during this time.  If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.

xscissor.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

yawn.shortDescJa: Target sleeps at the end of the next turn.
yawn.descJa: Puts the target to sleep at the end of the next turn.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  If the target leaves the field, this effect is canceled.  If the target has a status effect when this move is used, this move will fail.

zapcannon.shortDescJa: Has a chance to paralyze the target.
zapcannon.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to paralyze the target.

zenheadbutt.shortDescJa: Has a chance to make the target flinch.
zenheadbutt.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to make the target flinch.

adaptability.shortDescJa: Increases the same-type attack bonus from 1.5× to 2×.
adaptability.descJa: This Pokémon inflicts twice as much damage with moves whose types match its own, rather than the usual same-type attack bonus of 1.5×.

aerilate.shortDescJa: Turns the bearer's Normal moves into Flying moves and strengthens them to 1.3× their power.
aerilate.descJa: Turns the bearer's Normal-type moves into Flying-type moves.  Moves changed by this ability have 1.3× their power.

aftermath.shortDescJa: Damages the attacker for 1/4 its max HP when knocked out by a contact move.
aftermath.descJa: When this Pokémon is knocked out by a move that makes contact, the move's user takes 1/4 its maximum HP in damage.

airlock.shortDescJa: Negates all effects of weather, but does not prevent the weather itself.
airlock.descJa: While this Pokémon is in battle, weather can still be in play, but will not have any of its effects.

analytic.shortDescJa: Strengthens moves to 1.3× their power when moving last.
analytic.descJa: This Pokémon's moves have 1.3× their power when it moves last in a turn.

angerpoint.shortDescJa: Raises Attack to the maximum of six stages upon receiving a critical hit.
angerpoint.descJa: Whenever this Pokémon receives a critical hit, its Attack rises to the maximum of 6 stages.

angershell.shortDescJa: When the Pokémon's HP drops below half, Anger Shell lowers its Defense and Special Defense but its Attack, Special Attack and Speed are raised.
angershell.descJa: When an attack causes its HP to drop to half or less, the Pokémon gets angry. This lowers its Defense and Sp. Def stats but boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats.

anticipation.shortDescJa: Notifies all trainers upon entering battle if an opponent has a super-effective move, Self-Destruct, Explosion, or a one-hit KO move.
anticipation.descJa: When this Pokémon enters battle, if one of its opponents has a move that is super effective against it, Self-Destruct, Explosion, or a one-hit knockout move, all participating trainers are notified.

arenatrap.shortDescJa: Prevents opponents from fleeing or switching out.  Eluded by Flying-types and Pokémon in the air.
arenatrap.descJa: While this Pokémon is in battle, opposing Pokémon cannot flee or switch out.  Flying-type Pokémon and Pokémon in the air, e.g. due to Levitate or Magnet Rise, are unaffected.

armortail.shortDescJa: Prevents the opponent from using any moves that have priority, such as Quick Attack.
armortail.descJa: The mysterious tail covering the Pokémon’s head makes opponents unable to use priority moves against the Pokémon or its allies.

aromaveil.shortDescJa: Protects allies against moves that affect their mental state.
aromaveil.descJa: Protects allies against moves that affect their mental state.

asoneglastrier.shortDescJa: Combination of the Unnerve and Chilling Neigh Abilities.
asoneglastrier.descJa: Combination of the Unnerve and Chilling Neigh Abilities.

asonespectrier.shortDescJa: Combination of the Unnerve and Grim Neigh Abilities.
asonespectrier.descJa: Combination of the Unnerve and Grim Neigh Abilities.

aurabreak.shortDescJa: Makes Dark Aura and Fairy Aura weaken moves of their respective types.
aurabreak.descJa: While this Pokémon is on the field, Dark Aura and Fairy Aura weaken moves of their respective types to 2/3 their power, rather than strengthening them.

baddreams.shortDescJa: Damages sleeping opponents for 1/8 their max HP after each turn.
baddreams.descJa: Opposing Pokémon take 1/8 of their maximum HP in damage after each turn while they are asleep.

ballfetch.shortDescJa: If the Pokémon is not holding an item, it will fetch the Poké Ball from the first failed throw of the battle.
ballfetch.descJa: At any time after the first Poké Ball is thrown and fails to catch a Pokémon, at the end of a turn, if a Pokémon with Ball Fetch is on the field and not holding another item, it will pick up the same type of ball as the first one thrown.

battery.shortDescJa: Ally Pokémon's moves have their power increased to 1.3×.
battery.descJa: Ally Pokémon's moves have their power increased to 1.3×.

battlearmor.descJa: Moves cannot score critical hits against this Pokémon.

battlebond.shortDescJa: Transforms this Pokémon into Ash-Greninja after fainting an opponent.  Water Shuriken's power is 20 and always hits three times.
battlebond.descJa: Transforms this Pokémon into Ash-Greninja after fainting an opponent.  Water Shuriken's power is 20 and always hits three times.

beadsofruin.shortDescJa: Lowers Special Defense of all Pokémon except itself.
beadsofruin.descJa: The power of the Pokémon’s ruinous beads lowers the Sp. Def stats of all Pokémon except itself.

beastboost.shortDescJa: Raises this Pokémon's highest stat by one stage when it faints another Pokémon.
beastboost.descJa: Raises this Pokémon's highest stat by one stage when it faints another Pokémon.

berserk.shortDescJa: Raises this Pokémon's Special Attack by one stage every time its HP drops below half.
berserk.descJa: Whenever this Pokémon takes damage from a move that causes its HP to drop below 50%, its Special Attack rises by one stage.

bigpecks.descJa: This Pokémon's Defense cannot be lowered by other Pokémon.

blaze.shortDescJa: Strengthens Fire moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
blaze.descJa: When this Pokémon has 1/3 or less of its HP remaining, its Fire-type moves inflict 1.5× as much regular damage.

bulletproof.shortDescJa: Protects against bullet, ball, and bomb-based moves.
bulletproof.descJa: Protects against bullet, ball, and bomb-based moves.

cheekpouch.shortDescJa: Restores HP upon eating a Berry, in addition to the Berry's effect.
cheekpouch.descJa: Restores HP upon eating a Berry, in addition to the Berry's effect.

chillingneigh.shortDescJa: Boosts Attack after knocking out a Pokémon.
chillingneigh.descJa: When the Pokémon knocks out a target, it utters a chilling neigh, which boosts its Attack stat.

chlorophyll.descJa: This Pokémon's Speed is doubled during strong sunlight.

clearbody.shortDescJa: Prevents stats from being lowered by other Pokémon.
clearbody.descJa: This Pokémon cannot have its stats lowered by other Pokémon.

cloudnine.shortDescJa: Negates all effects of weather, but does not prevent the weather itself.
cloudnine.descJa: While this Pokémon is in battle, weather can still be in play, but will not have any of its effects.

colorchange.shortDescJa: Changes type to match when hit by a damaging move.
colorchange.descJa: Whenever this Pokémon takes damage from a move, the Pokémon's type changes to match the move.

comatose.shortDescJa: This Pokémon always  acts as though it were Asleep.
comatose.descJa: This Pokémon always acts as though it were Asleep.  It cannot be given another status ailment; it's unaffected by Yawn; it can use Sleep Talk; and so on.

commander.shortDescJa: Goes inside the mouth of an ally Dondozo if one is on the field.
commander.descJa: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it goes inside the mouth of an ally Dondozo if one is on the field. The Pokémon then issues commands from there.

competitive.shortDescJa: Raises Special Attack by two stages upon having any stat lowered.
competitive.descJa: Raises Special Attack by two stages upon having any stat lowered.

compoundeyes.descJa: This Pokémon's moves have 1.3× their accuracy.

contrary.descJa: Whenever this Pokémon's stats would be raised, they are instead lowered by the same amount, and vice versa.

corrosion.shortDescJa: This Pokémon can inflict poison on Poison and Steel Pokémon.
corrosion.descJa: This Pokémon's moves and item ignore the usual immunity of Poison and Steel Pokémon when attempting to inflict poison.

costar.shortDescJa: Copies ally's stat changes on entering battle.
costar.descJa: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it copies an ally’s stat changes.

cottondown.shortDescJa: When Ignores moves and abilities that draw in moves.
cottondown.descJa: When the Pokémon is hit by an attack, it scatters cotton fluff around and lowers the Speed stats of all Pokémon except itself.

cudchew.shortDescJa: Causes the Pokémon to reuse an already consumed Berry at the end of the next turn.
cudchew.descJa: When the Pokémon eats a Berry, it will regurgitate that Berry at the end of the next turn and eat it one more time.

curiousmedicine.shortDescJa: Resets all stat changes upon entering battlefield.
curiousmedicine.descJa: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it scatters medicine from its shell, which removes all stat changes from allies.

cursedbody.shortDescJa: Has a 30% chance of Disabling any move that hits the Pokémon.
cursedbody.descJa: Moves that hit this Pokémon have a 30% chance of being Disabled afterward.

cutecharm.shortDescJa: Has a 30% chance of infatuating attacking Pokémon on contact.
cutecharm.descJa: Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, the move's user has a 30% chance of being infatuated.

damp.shortDescJa: Prevents Self-Destruct, Explosion, and Aftermath from working while the Pokémon is in battle.
damp.descJa: While this Pokémon is in battle, Self-Destruct and Explosion will fail and Aftermath will not take effect.

dancer.shortDescJa: Whenever another Pokémon uses a dance move, this Pokémon will use the same move immediately afterwards.
dancer.descJa: Whenever another Pokémon uses a dance move, this Pokémon will use the same move immediately afterwards.

darkaura.shortDescJa: Strengthens Dark moves to 1.33× their power for all friendly and opposing Pokémon.
darkaura.descJa: Strengthens Dark moves for all friendly and opposing Pokémon.

dauntlessshield.descJa: Boosts the Pokémon’s Defense stat the first time the Pokémon enters a battle.

dazzling.shortDescJa: Opposing Pokémon cannot use priority attacks.
dazzling.descJa: When an opposing Pokémon attempts to use a move that targets this Pokémon or an ally, and that move has priority, it will fail.

defeatist.shortDescJa: Halves Attack and Special Attack at 50% max HP or less.
defeatist.descJa: This Pokémon's Attack and Special Attack are halved when it has half its HP or less.

defiant.shortDescJa: Raises Attack two stages upon having any stat lowered.
defiant.descJa: When any of this Pokémon's stats are lowered, its Attack rises by two stages.

deltastream.shortDescJa: Creates a mysterious air current, which cannot be replaced and causes moves to never be super effective against Flying Pokémon.
deltastream.descJa: When this Pokémon enters battle or gains this ability, the weather becomes a mysterious air current.  A mysterious air current causes moves to not be super effective against Flying; they do neutral damage instead.  Anticipation and Stealth Rock are not affected.

desolateland.shortDescJa: Creates extremely harsh sunlight, which has all the properties of Sunny Day, cannot be replaced, and causes damaging Water moves to fail.
desolateland.descJa: When this Pokémon enters battle or gains this ability, the weather becomes extremely harsh sunlight.  Extremely harsh sunlight has all the properties of Sunny Day and also causes damaging Water moves to fail.

disguise.shortDescJa: Prevents the first instance of battle damage.
disguise.descJa: If this Pokémon is in its Disguised Form and takes damage from a move, it switches to its Busted Form and the damage is prevented.  Other effects are not prevented.

download.shortDescJa: Raises the attack stat corresponding to the opponents' weaker defense one stage upon entering battle.
download.descJa: When this Pokémon enters battle, its Attack or Special Attack, whichever corresponds to its opponents' weaker total defensive stat, rises one stage.  In the event of a tie, Special Attack is raised.

dragonsmaw.descJa: Increases the power of Dragon-type moves used by this Pokémon by 50%.

dragonize.shortDescJa: The Pokémon's Normal-type moves become Dragon-type moves and their power is boosted by 20%.
dragonize.descJa: The Pokémon's Normal-type moves become Dragon-type moves and their power is boosted by 20%.

drizzle.shortDescJa: Summons rain that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.
drizzle.descJa: The weather changes to rain when this Pokémon enters battle and does not end unless replaced by another weather condition.

drought.shortDescJa: Summons strong sunlight that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.
drought.descJa: The weather changes to strong sunlight when this Pokémon enters battle and does not end unless cancelled by another weather condition.

dryskin.shortDescJa: Causes 1/8 max HP in damage each turn during strong sunlight, but heals for 1/8 max HP during rain.  Increases damage from Fire moves to 1.25×, but absorbs Water moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.
dryskin.descJa: This Pokémon takes 1/8 of its maximum HP in damage after each turn during strong sunlight, but it heals for 1/8 of its HP each turn during rain.  This Pokémon takes 1.25× as much damage from Fire-type moves, but whenever a Water move hits it, it heals for 1/4 its maximum HP instead.

earlybird.shortDescJa: Makes sleep pass twice as quickly.
earlybird.descJa: This Pokémon's remaining sleep turn count falls by 2 rather than 1.

eartheater.shortDescJa: Restores HP when hit by a Ground-type move.
eartheater.descJa: If hit by a Ground-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.

effectspore.shortDescJa: Has a 30% chance of inflcting either paralysis, poison, or sleep on attacking Pokémon on contact.
effectspore.descJa: Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, the move's user has a 30% chance of being paralyzed, poisoned, or put to sleep, chosen at random.

electricsurge.shortDescJa: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Electric Terrain.
electricsurge.descJa: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Electric Terrain.

electromorphosis.shortDescJa: When hit by an attack, the power of the next Electric-type move it uses is doubled.
electromorphosis.descJa: The Pokémon becomes charged when it takes damage, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokémon uses.

embodyaspectcornerstone.nameJa: おもかげやどし(いしずえ)
embodyaspectcornerstone.shortDescJa: 登場時に自分の防御を1段階上げる。
embodyaspectcornerstone.descJa: 登場時に自分の防御を1段階上げる。

embodyaspecthearthflame.nameJa: おもかげやどし(かまど)
embodyaspecthearthflame.shortDescJa: 登場時に自分の攻撃を1段階上げる。
embodyaspecthearthflame.descJa: 登場時に自分の攻撃を1段階上げる。

embodyaspectteal.nameJa: おもかげやどし(みどり)
embodyaspectteal.shortDescJa: 登場時に自分の素早さを1段階上げる。
embodyaspectteal.descJa: 登場時に自分の素早さを1段階上げる。

embodyaspectwellspring.shortDescJa: 登場時に自分の特防を1段階上げる。
embodyaspectwellspring.descJa: 登場時に自分の特防を1段階上げる。

emergencyexit.shortDescJa: This Pokémon automatically switches out when its HP drops below half.
emergencyexit.descJa: After this Pokémon is hit by a move, if that move caused this Pokémon's HP to drop below half, it switches out.

fairyaura.shortDescJa: Strengthens Fairy moves to 1.33× their power for all friendly and opposing Pokémon.
fairyaura.descJa: Strengthens Fairy moves for all friendly and opposing Pokémon.

filter.shortDescJa: Decreases damage taken from super-effective moves by 1/4.
filter.descJa: This Pokémon takes 0.75× as much damage from moves that are super effective against it.

flamebody.shortDescJa: Has a 30% chance of burning attacking Pokémon on contact.
flamebody.descJa: Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, the move's user has a 30% chance of being burned.

flareboost.shortDescJa: Increases Special Attack to 1.5× when burned.
flareboost.descJa: This Pokémon has 1.5× its Special Attack when burned.

flashfire.shortDescJa: Protects against Fire moves.  Once one has been blocked, the Pokémon's own Fire moves inflict 1.5× damage until it leaves battle.
flashfire.descJa: This Pokémon is immune to Fire-type moves.  Once this Pokémon has been hit by a Fire move, its own Fire moves will inflict 1.5× as much damage until it leaves battle.

flowergift.shortDescJa: Increases friendly Pokémon's Attack and Special Defense to 1.5× during strong sunlight.
flowergift.descJa: Friendly Pokémon have 1.5× their Attack and Special Defense during strong sunlight if any friendly Pokémon has this ability.

flowerveil.shortDescJa: Protects friendly Grass Pokémon from having their stats lowered by other Pokémon.
flowerveil.descJa: Protects friendly Grass Pokémon from having their stats lowered by other Pokémon.

fluffy.shortDescJa: Damage from contact moves is halved.  Damage from Fire moves is doubled.
fluffy.descJa: Damage from contact moves is halved.  Damage from Fire moves is doubled.

forecast.shortDescJa: Changes Castform's type and form to match the weather.
forecast.descJa: During rain, strong sunlight, or hail, this Pokémon's type changes to Water, Fire, or Ice, respectively, and its form changes to match.

forewarn.shortDescJa: Reveals the opponents' strongest move upon entering battle.
forewarn.descJa: When this Pokémon enters battle, it reveals the move with the highest base power known by any opposing Pokémon to all participating trainers.

friendguard.shortDescJa: Decreases all direct damage taken by friendly Pokémon to 0.75×.
friendguard.descJa: All friendly Pokémon take 0.75× as much direct damage from moves while this Pokémon is in battle.

frisk.shortDescJa: Reveals an opponent's held item upon entering battle.
frisk.descJa: When this Pokémon enters battle, it reveals an opposing Pokémon's held item to all participating trainers.

fullmetalbody.shortDescJa: Other Pokémon cannot lower this Pokémon's stats.
fullmetalbody.descJa: This Pokémon's stats cannot be lowered by other Pokémon's moves or abilities.  This effect only applies to normal stat modifications and not more exotic effects such as Topsy-Turvy or Power Swap.

galewings.shortDescJa: Raises Flying moves' priority by one stage.
galewings.descJa: Raises Flying moves' priority by one stage.

galvanize.shortDescJa: This Pokémon's Normal moves are Electric and have their power increased to 1.2×.
galvanize.descJa: When this Pokémon uses a Normal moves, that move is Electric its power is 1.2×.

gluttony.shortDescJa: Makes the Pokémon eat any held Berry triggered by low HP below 1/2 its max HP.
gluttony.descJa: This Pokémon eats any held Berry triggered by low HP when it falls below 50% of its HP, regardless of the Berry's usual threshold.

goodasgold.descJa: A body of pure, solid gold gives the Pokémon full immunity to other Pokémon’s status moves.

gooey.shortDescJa: Lowers attacking Pokémon's Speed by one stage on contact.
gooey.descJa: Lowers attacking Pokémon's Speed by one stage on contact.

gorillatactics.shortDescJa: Boosts the Pokémon's Attack stat but only allows the use of the first selected move.
gorillatactics.descJa: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat but only allows the use of the first selected move.

grasspelt.shortDescJa: Boosts Defense while Grassy Terrain is in effect.
grasspelt.descJa: Boosts Defense while Grassy Terrain is in effect.

grassysurge.shortDescJa: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Grassy Terrain.
grassysurge.descJa: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Grassy Terrain.

grimneigh.shortDescJa: Boosts Special Attack after knocking out a Pokémon.
grimneigh.descJa: When the Pokémon knocks out a target, it utters a terrifying neigh, which boosts its Sp. Atk stat.

guarddog.shortDescJa: Boosts Attack if intimidated, and prevents being forced to switch out.
guarddog.descJa: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat if intimidated. Moves and items that would force the Pokémon to switch out also fail to work.

gulpmissile.shortDescJa: If a Cramorant with Gulp Missile uses Surf or Dive, it catches prey and changes its form depending on its remaining HP.
gulpmissile.descJa: When the Pokémon uses Surf or Dive, it will come back with prey. When it takes damage, it will spit out the prey to attack.

guts.shortDescJa: Increases Attack to 1.5× with a major status ailment.
guts.descJa: Whenever this Pokémon is asleep, burned, paralyzed, or poisoned, it has 1.5× its Attack.  This Pokémon is not affected by the usual Attack cut from a burn.

hadronengine.shortDescJa: Creates an Electric Terrain when entering battle, and boosts Special Attack while active.
hadronengine.descJa: Turns the ground into Electric Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle. The futuristic engine within the Pokémon also boosts its Sp. Atk stat on Electric Terrain.

harvest.shortDescJa: Has a 50% chance of restoring a used Berry after each turn if the Pokémon has held no items in the meantime.
harvest.descJa: After each turn, if the last item this Pokémon consumed was a Berry and it is not currently holding an item, it has a 50% chance of regaining that Berry, or a 100% chance during strong sunlight.

healer.shortDescJa: Has a 30% chance of curing each adjacent ally of any major status ailment after each turn.
healer.descJa: Friendly Pokémon next to this Pokémon in double and triple battles each have a 30% chance of being cured of any major status ailment after each turn.

heatproof.shortDescJa: Halves damage from Fire moves and burns.
heatproof.descJa: This Pokémon takes half as much damage from Fire-type moves and burns.

heavymetal.descJa: This Pokémon has double the usual weight for its species.

honeygather.shortDescJa: The Pokémon may pick up Honey after battle.
honeygather.descJa: This Pokémon has a chance of picking up Honey after each battle.  This chance starts at 5% and rises another 5% after every tenth level: 5% from level 1–10, 10% from 11–20, and so on, up to 50% from 91–100.

hospitality.shortDescJa: When a Pokémon with Hospitality enters a battle, it restores HP for an ally by 25%.
hospitality.descJa: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it showers its ally with hospitality, restoring a small amount of the ally's HP.

hugepower.descJa: This Pokémon's Attack is doubled while in battle.

hungerswitch.shortDescJa: Causes Morpeko to change its form each turn, alternating between Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode
hungerswitch.descJa: The Pokémon changes its form, alternating between its Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode after the end of every turn.

hustle.shortDescJa: Strengthens physical moves to inflict 1.5× damage, but decreases their accuracy to 0.8×.
hustle.descJa: This Pokémon's physical moves do 1.5× as much regular damage, but have 0.8× their usual accuracy.

hydration.shortDescJa: Cures any major status ailment after each turn during rain.
hydration.descJa: This Pokémon is cured of any major status ailment after each turn during rain.

hypercutter.shortDescJa: Prevents Attack from being lowered by other Pokémon.
hypercutter.descJa: This Pokémon's Attack cannot be lowered by other Pokémon.

icebody.shortDescJa: Heals for 1/16 max HP after each turn during hail.  Protects against hail damage.
icebody.descJa: This Pokémon heals for 1/16 of its maximum HP after each turn during hail, and it does not take hail damage regardless of type.

iceface.shortDescJa: The Pokémon’s ice head can take a physical attack as a substitute, but the attack also changes the Pokémon’s appearance. The ice will be restored when it snows.
iceface.descJa: When an Eiscue that's in its Ice Face form is hit by a physical move, it takes no damage and changes into its Noice Face form. If a hailstorm or snowstorm begins while Eiscue is in its Noice Face form, or if it is sent out in its Noice Face form during hail, it will immediately revert to its Ice Face form.

icescales.descJa: The Pokémon is protected by ice scales, which halve the damage taken from special moves.

illuminate.descJa: Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, the wild encounter rate is doubled.

illusion.shortDescJa: Takes the appearance of the last conscious party Pokémon upon being sent out until hit by a damaging move.
illusion.descJa: This Pokémon, upon being sent out, appears to have the species, nickname, and Poké Ball of the last Pokémon in the party that is able to battle.  This illusion breaks upon being hit by a damaging move.

immunity.descJa: This Pokémon cannot be poisoned.  This includes bad poison.

imposter.descJa: This Pokémon transforms into a random opponent upon entering battle.  This effect is identical to the move Transform.

infiltrator.shortDescJa: Bypasses Light Screen, Reflect, and Safeguard.
infiltrator.descJa: This Pokémon's moves ignore Light Screen, Reflect, and Safeguard.

innardsout.shortDescJa: When this Pokémon faints from an opponent's move, that opponent takes damage equal to the HP this Pokémon had remaining.
innardsout.descJa: When this Pokémon faints from an opponent's move, that opponent takes damage equal to the HP this Pokémon had remaining.

intimidate.shortDescJa: Lowers opponents' Attack one stage upon entering battle.
intimidate.descJa: When this Pokémon enters battle, the opponent's Attack is lowered by one stage.  In a double battle, both opponents are affected.

intrepidsword.descJa: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat the first time the Pokémon enters a battle.

ironbarbs.shortDescJa: Damages attacking Pokémon for 1/8 their max HP on contact.
ironbarbs.descJa: Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, the move's user takes 1/8 of its maximum HP in damage.

ironfist.shortDescJa: Strengthens punch-based moves to 1.2× their power.
ironfist.descJa: Moves flagged as being punch-based have 1.2× their base power for this Pokémon.

justified.shortDescJa: Raises Attack one stage upon taking damage from a Dark move.
justified.descJa: Whenever a Dark-type move hits this Pokémon, its Attack rises one stage.

keeneye.descJa: This Pokémon cannot have its accuracy lowered.

klutz.shortDescJa: Prevents the Pokémon from using its held item in battle.
klutz.descJa: In battle, this Pokémon cannot use its held item, nor will the item have any passive effect on the battle, positive or negative.  This Pokémon also cannot use Fling.

leafguard.shortDescJa: Protects against major status ailments during strong sunlight.
leafguard.descJa: This Pokémon cannot be given a major status ailment during strong sunlight.

levitate.descJa: This Pokémon is immune to Ground-type moves, Spikes, Toxic Spikes, and Arena Trap.

libero.shortDescJa: Libero changes the Pokémon's type to that of its previously used attack.
libero.descJa: Changes the Pokémon’s type to the type of the move it’s about to use. This works only once each time the Pokémon enters battle.

lightmetal.descJa: This Pokémon has half the usual weight for its species.

lightningrod.shortDescJa: Redirects single-target Electric moves to this Pokémon where possible.  Absorbs Electric moves, raising Special Attack one stage.
lightningrod.descJa: All other Pokémon's single-target Electric-type moves are redirected to this Pokémon if it is an eligible target.  Other Pokémon's Electric moves raise this Pokémon's Special Attack one stage, negating any other effect on it, and cannot miss it.

lingeringaroma.shortDescJa: Contact changes the attacker's Ability to Lingering Aroma.
lingeringaroma.descJa: Contact with the Pokémon changes the attacker’s Ability to Lingering Aroma.

liquidooze.shortDescJa: Damages opponents using leeching moves for as much as they would heal.
liquidooze.descJa: Whenever a Pokémon would heal after hitting this Pokémon with a leeching move like Absorb, it instead loses as many HP as it would usually gain.

liquidvoice.descJa: When this Pokémon uses a move that is sound-based, that move's type is Water.

longreach.shortDescJa: This Pokémon's moves do not make contact.
longreach.descJa: A move used by this Pokémon will not make contact.

magicbounce.shortDescJa: Reflects most non-damaging moves back at their user.
magicbounce.descJa: When this Pokémon is targeted by a move flagged as being reflectable, the move is redirected to its user.

magicguard.shortDescJa: Protects against damage not directly caused by a move.
magicguard.descJa: This Pokémon is immune to damage not directly caused by a move.

magician.shortDescJa: Steals the target's held item when the bearer uses a damaging move.
magician.descJa: Steals the target's held item when the bearer uses a damaging move.

magnetpull.shortDescJa: Prevents Steel opponents from fleeing or switching out.
magnetpull.descJa: While this Pokémon is in battle, opposing Steel-type Pokémon cannot flee or switch out.

marvelscale.shortDescJa: Increases Defense to 1.5× with a major status ailment.
marvelscale.descJa: Whenever this Pokémon has a major status ailment, it has 1.5× its Defense.

megalauncher.shortDescJa: Strengthens aura and pulse moves to 1.5× their power.
megalauncher.descJa: Strengthens aura and pulse moves to 1.5× their power.

megasol.shortDescJa: The Pokémon can use its moves as if the weather were harsh sunlight.
megasol.descJa: Even when the sunlight has not turned harsh, the Pokémon can use its moves as if the weather were harsh sunlight.

merciless.shortDescJa: This Pokémon's moves critical hit against poisoned targets.
merciless.descJa: This Pokémon's moves critical hit against poisoned targets.

mimicry.shortDescJa: Changes type depending on the terrain.
mimicry.descJa: Changes the Pokémon’s type depending on the terrain.

mindseye.shortDescJa: The Pokémon ignores changes to opponents' evasiveness, its accuracy can't be lowered, and it can hit Ghost types with Normal- and Fighting-type moves.
mindseye.descJa: Mind's Eye enables the Pokémon with this Ability to hit Ghost-type Pokémon with damage-dealing Normal- and Fighting-type moves. It also prevents other Pokémon from lowering the Pokémon's accuracy and ignores changes to the opponents' evasion.

minus.shortDescJa: Increases Special Attack to 1.5× when a friendly Pokémon has Plus or Minus.
minus.descJa: This Pokémon has 1.5× its Special Attack if any friendly Pokémon has Plus or Minus.

mirrorarmor.descJa: Bounces back only the stat-lowering effects that the Pokémon receives.

mistysurge.shortDescJa: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Misty Terrain.
mistysurge.descJa: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Misty Terrain.

moldbreaker.shortDescJa: Bypasses targets' abilities if they could hinder or prevent a move.
moldbreaker.descJa: This Pokémon's moves completely ignore abilities that could hinder or prevent their effect on the target.

moody.shortDescJa: Raises a random stat two stages and lowers another one stage after each turn.
moody.descJa: After each turn, one of this Pokémon's stats at random rises two stages, and another falls one stage.

motordrive.shortDescJa: Absorbs Electric moves, raising Speed one stage.
motordrive.descJa: Whenever an Electric-type move hits this Pokémon, its Speed rises one stage, negating any other effect on it.

moxie.shortDescJa: Raises Attack one stage upon KOing a Pokémon.
moxie.descJa: This Pokémon's Attack rises one stage upon knocking out another Pokémon, even a friendly Pokémon.

multiscale.shortDescJa: Halves damage taken from full HP.
multiscale.descJa: This Pokémon takes half as much damage when it is hit having full HP.

multitype.shortDescJa: Changes Arceus's type and form to match its held Plate.
multitype.descJa: If this Pokémon is holding an elemental Plate, its type and form change to match the Plate.

mummy.shortDescJa: Changes attacking Pokémon's abilities to Mummy on contact.
mummy.descJa: Whenever a contact move hits this Pokémon, the attacking Pokémon's ability changes to Mummy.

myceliummight.shortDescJa: Status moves go last, but are not affected by the opponent's ability.
myceliummight.descJa: The Pokémon will always act more slowly when using status moves, but these moves will be unimpeded by the Ability of the target.

naturalcure.shortDescJa: Cures any major status ailment upon switching out.
naturalcure.descJa: This Pokémon is cured of any major status ailment when it is switched out for another Pokémon.

neutralizinggas.shortDescJa: Neutralizes abilities of all Pokémon in battle.
neutralizinggas.descJa: While the Pokémon is in the battle, the effects of all other Pokémon’s Abilities will be nullified or will not be triggered.

noguard.shortDescJa: Ensures all moves used by and against the Pokémon hit.
noguard.descJa: Moves used by or against this Pokémon never miss.

normalize.shortDescJa: Makes the Pokémon's moves all act Normal-type.
normalize.descJa: This Pokémon's moves all act as if they were Normal-type.

oblivious.shortDescJa: Prevents infatuation and protects against Captivate.
oblivious.descJa: This Pokémon cannot be infatuated and is immune to Captivate.

opportunist.shortDescJa: Copies stat boosts by the opponent.
opportunist.descJa: If an opponent’s stat is boosted, the Pokémon seizes the opportunity to boost the same stat for itself.

orichalcumpulse.shortDescJa: Turns the sunlight harsh when entering battle, and boosts Attack while active.
orichalcumpulse.descJa: Turns the sunlight harsh when the Pokémon enters a battle. The ancient pulse thrumming through the Pokémon also boosts its Attack stat in harsh sunlight.

overcoat.descJa: This Pokémon does not take damage from weather.

overgrow.shortDescJa: Strengthens Grass moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
overgrow.descJa: When this Pokémon has 1/3 or less of its HP remaining, its Grass-type moves inflict 1.5× as much regular damage.

parentalbond.shortDescJa: Lets the bearer hit twice with damaging moves.  The second hit has half power.
parentalbond.descJa: Lets the bearer hit twice with damaging moves.  The second hit has half power.

pastelveil.shortDescJa: Prevents the Pokémon and its allies from being poisoned.
pastelveil.descJa: Prevents the Pokémon and its teammates from being poisoned. It also cures teammates of poisoning when it enters the battlefield.

perishbody.shortDescJa: When hit by a move that makes direct contact, the Pokémon and the attacker will faint after three turns unless they switch out of battle.
perishbody.descJa: When the Pokémon with Perish Body is hit with a contact move, both the attacker and the Pokémon with Perish Body will faint in three turns.

pickpocket.shortDescJa: Steals attacking Pokémon's held items on contact.
pickpocket.descJa: Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, if it does not have a held item, it steals the attacker's held item.
