pickup.shortDescJa: Picks up other Pokémon's used and Flung held items.  May also pick up an item after battle.
pickup.descJa: At the end of each turn, if another Pokémon consumed or Flung a held item that turn, this Pokémon picks up the item if it is not already holding one.  After each battle, this Pokémon has a 10% chance of picking up an item if it is not already holding one.

piercingdrill.shortDescJa: When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets that are protecting themselves.
piercingdrill.descJa: When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets that are protecting themselves, dealing 1/4 of the damage that the move would otherwise deal. Everything aside from the target's protective effects is still triggered.

pixilate.shortDescJa: Turns the bearer's Normal moves into Fairy moves and strengthens them to 1.3× their power.
pixilate.descJa: Turns the bearer's Normal-type moves into Fairy moves.  Moves changed by this ability have 1.3× their power.

plus.shortDescJa: Increases Special Attack to 1.5× when a friendly Pokémon has Plus or Minus.
plus.descJa: This Pokémon has 1.5× its Special Attack if any friendly Pokémon has Plus or Minus.

poisonheal.shortDescJa: Heals for 1/8 max HP after each turn when poisoned in place of damage.
poisonheal.descJa: If this Pokémon is poisoned, it will heal for 1/8 of its maximum HP after each turn rather than taking damage.  This includes bad poison.

poisonpoint.shortDescJa: Has a 30% chance of poisoning attacking Pokémon on contact.
poisonpoint.descJa: Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, the move's user has a 30% chance of being poisoned.

poisonpuppeteer.shortDescJa: Pokémon poisoned by Pecharunt's moves will also become confused.
poisonpuppeteer.descJa: When a Pokémon is poisoned by any of Pecharunt's moves, it will also become confused.

poisontouch.shortDescJa: Has a 30% chance of poisoning target Pokémon upon contact.
poisontouch.descJa: This Pokémon's contact moves have a 30% chance of poisoning the target with each hit.

powerconstruct.shortDescJa: Transforms 10% or 50% Zygarde into Complete Forme when its HP is below 50%.
powerconstruct.descJa: Transforms 10% or 50% Zygarde into Complete Forme when its HP is below 50%.

powerofalchemy.shortDescJa: When an ally faints, this Pokémon gains its Ability.
powerofalchemy.descJa: When an ally faints, this Pokémon gains its Ability.

powerspot.shortDescJa: Just being next to the Pokémon powers up moves.
powerspot.descJa: The power of moves used by the allies of the Pokémon with Power Spot is increased by 30%.

prankster.shortDescJa: Raises non-damaging moves' priority by one stage.
prankster.descJa: This Pokémon's non-damaging moves have their priority increased by one stage.

pressure.shortDescJa: Increases the PP cost of moves targetting the Pokémon by one.
pressure.descJa: Moves targetting this Pokémon use one extra PP.

primordialsea.shortDescJa: Creates heavy rain, which has all the properties of Rain Dance, cannot be replaced, and causes damaging Fire moves to fail.
primordialsea.descJa: When this Pokémon enters battle or gains this ability, the weather becomes heavy rain.  Heavy rain has all the properties of Rain Dance and also causes damaging Fire moves to fail.

prismarmor.descJa: Super-effective damage this Pokémon takes is reduced to 0.75×.

propellertail.shortDescJa: Ignores moves and abilities that draw in moves.
propellertail.descJa: Ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon’s Abilities and moves that draw in moves.

protean.shortDescJa: Changes the bearer's type to match each move it uses.
protean.descJa: Changes the bearer's type to match each move it uses.

protosynthesis.shortDescJa: Raises highest stat in harsh sunlight, or if holding Booster Energy.
protosynthesis.descJa: Boosts the Pokémon’s most proficient stat in harsh sunlight or if the Pokémon is holding Booster Energy.

psychicsurge.shortDescJa: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Psychic Terrain.
psychicsurge.descJa: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Psychic Terrain.

punkrock.shortDescJa: Boosts sound-based moves and halves damage from the same moves.
punkrock.descJa: Boosts the power of sound-based moves. The Pokémon also takes half the damage from these kinds of moves.

purepower.descJa: This Pokémon's Attack is doubled in battle.

purifyingsalt.shortDescJa: Protects from status conditions and halves damage from Ghost-type moves.
purifyingsalt.descJa: The Pokémon’s pure salt protects it from status conditions and halves the damage taken from Ghost-type moves.

quarkdrive.shortDescJa: Raises highest stat on Electric Terrain, or if holding Booster Energy.
quarkdrive.descJa: Boosts the Pokémon’s most proficient stat on Electric Terrain or if the Pokémon is holding Booster Energy.

queenlymajesty.shortDescJa: Opposing Pokémon cannot use priority attacks.
queenlymajesty.descJa: When an opposing Pokémon attempts to use a move that targets this Pokémon or an ally, and that move has priority, it will fail.

quickdraw.shortDescJa: Enables the Pokémon to move first occasionally.
quickdraw.descJa: If a Pokémon with this Ability selects a damaging move, it has a 30% chance of going first in its priority bracket.

quickfeet.shortDescJa: Increases Speed to 1.5× with a major status ailment.
quickfeet.descJa: Whenever this Pokémon has a major status ailment, it has 1.5× its Speed.  This Pokémon is not affected by the usual Speed cut from paralysis.

raindish.shortDescJa: Heals for 1/16 max HP after each turn during rain.
raindish.descJa: This Pokémon heals for 1/16 of its maximum HP after each turn during rain.

rattled.shortDescJa: Raises Speed one stage upon being hit by a Dark, Ghost, or Bug move.
rattled.descJa: This Pokémon's Speed rises one stage with each hit from a damaging Dark-, Ghost-, or Bug-type move.

receiver.shortDescJa: When an ally faints, this Pokémon gains its Ability.
receiver.descJa: When an ally faints, this Pokémon gains its Ability.

reckless.shortDescJa: Strengthens recoil moves to 1.2× their power.
reckless.descJa: This Pokémon's recoil moves and crash moves have 1.2× their base power.

refrigerate.shortDescJa: Turns the bearer's Normal moves into Ice moves and strengthens them to 1.3× their power.
refrigerate.descJa: Turns the bearer's Normal-type moves into Ice-type moves.  Moves changed by this ability have 1.3× their power.

regenerator.shortDescJa: Heals for 1/3 max HP upon switching out.
regenerator.descJa: This Pokémon regains 1/3 of its maximum HP when it is switched out for another Pokémon under any circumstances other than having fainted.

ripen.descJa: Ripens Berries and doubles their effect.

rivalry.shortDescJa: Increases damage inflicted to 1.25× against Pokémon of the same gender, but decreases damage to 0.75× against the opposite gender.
rivalry.descJa: This Pokémon inflicts 1.25× as much regular damage against Pokémon of the same gender and 0.75× as much regular damage against Pokémon of the opposite gender.

rkssystem.shortDescJa: Changes this Pokémon's type to match its held Memory.
rkssystem.descJa: Changes this Pokémon's type to match its held Memory.

rockhead.descJa: This Pokémon does not receive recoil damage from its recoil moves.

rockypayload.descJa: Increases the power of Rock-type moves used by this Pokémon by 50%.

roughskin.shortDescJa: Damages attacking Pokémon for 1/8 their max HP on contact.
roughskin.descJa: Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, the move's user takes 1/8 of its maximum HP in damage.

runaway.shortDescJa: Ensures success fleeing from wild battles.
runaway.descJa: This Pokémon is always successful fleeing from wild battles, even if trapped by a move or ability.

sandforce.shortDescJa: Strengthens Rock, Ground, and Steel moves to 1.3× their power during a sandstorm.  Protects against sandstorm damage.
sandforce.descJa: During a sandstorm, this Pokémon's Rock-, Ground-, and Steel-type moves have 1.3× their base power.  This Pokémon does not take sandstorm damage, regardless of type.

sandrush.shortDescJa: Doubles Speed during a sandstorm.  Protects against sandstorm damage.
sandrush.descJa: This Pokémon's Speed is doubled during a sandstorm, and it does not take sandstorm damage, regardless of type.

sandspit.shortDescJa: Creates a sandstorm when hit by an attack.
sandspit.descJa: The Pokémon creates a sandstorm when it’s hit by an attack.

sandstream.shortDescJa: Summons a sandstorm that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.
sandstream.descJa: The weather changes to a sandstorm when this Pokémon enters battle and does not end unless cancelled by another weather condition.

sandveil.shortDescJa: Increases evasion to 1.25× during a sandstorm.  Protects against sandstorm damage.
sandveil.descJa: During a sandstorm, this Pokémon has 1.25× its evasion, and it does not take sandstorm damage regardless of type.

sapsipper.shortDescJa: Absorbs Grass moves, raising Attack one stage.
sapsipper.descJa: Whenever a Grass-type move hits this Pokémon, its Attack rises one stage, negating any other effect on it.

schooling.shortDescJa: Wishiwashi becomes Schooling Form when its HP is 25% or higher.
schooling.descJa: If this Pokémon is a Wishiwashi and level 20 or above, then when it enters battle and at the start of each turn, it becomes Schooling Form if its HP is 25% or higher and Solo Form otherwise.

scrappy.shortDescJa: Lets the Pokémon's Normal and Fighting moves hit Ghost Pokémon.
scrappy.descJa: This Pokémon ignores Ghost-type Pokémon's immunity to Normal- and Fighting-type moves.

screencleaner.shortDescJa: Nullifies effects of Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil.
screencleaner.descJa: When the Pokémon enters a battle, the effects of Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil are nullified for both opposing and ally Pokémon.

seedsower.shortDescJa: Turns the ground into Grassy Terrain when the Pokémon is hit by an attack.
seedsower.descJa: Turns the ground into Grassy Terrain when the Pokémon is hit by an attack.

serenegrace.shortDescJa: Doubles the chance of moves' extra effects occurring.
serenegrace.descJa: This Pokémon's moves have twice their usual effect chance.

shadowshield.shortDescJa: When this Pokémon has full HP, regular damage from moves is halved.
shadowshield.descJa: When this Pokémon has full HP, regular damage (not fixed damage!) from moves is halved.

shadowtag.shortDescJa: Prevents opponents from fleeing or switching out.
shadowtag.descJa: While this Pokémon is in battle, opposing Pokémon cannot flee or switch out.

sharpness.descJa: Increases the power of all 'slicing' moves by 50%.

shedskin.shortDescJa: Has a 33% chance of curing any major status ailment after each turn.
shedskin.descJa: After each turn, this Pokémon has a 33% of being cured of any major status ailment.

sheerforce.shortDescJa: Strengthens moves with extra effects to 1.3× their power, but prevents their extra effects.
sheerforce.descJa: This Pokémon's moves with extra effects have 1.3× their power, but lose their extra effects.

shellarmor.descJa: Moves cannot score critical hits against this Pokémon.

shielddust.shortDescJa: Protects against incoming moves' extra effects.
shielddust.descJa: This Pokémon is immune to the extra effects of moves used against it.

shieldsdown.shortDescJa: Transforms this Minior between Core Form and Meteor Form.  Prevents major status ailments and drowsiness while in Meteor Form.
shieldsdown.descJa: When this Pokémon enters battle and at the end of each turn, if its HP is 50% or above, it changes into Meteor Form; otherwise, it changes into Core Form.  In Meteor Form, it cannot be given a major status ailment (though existing ones are not cured), cannot become drowsy from Yawn, and cannot use Rest (which will simply fail).

simple.shortDescJa: Doubles the Pokémon's stat modifiers.  These doubled modifiers are still capped at -6 or 6 stages.
simple.descJa: Each stage of this Pokémon's stat modifiers acts as two stages.  These doubled stages are still limited to a minimum of -6 and a maximum of 6.

skilllink.shortDescJa: Extends two-to-five-hit moves and Triple Kick to their full length every time.
